name: Select Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Dining, Travel, International, Birthday, and incremental spends above ₹20,000
Utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway transactions

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per quarter, subject to a minimum spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free credit card with zero joining and annual fees

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
3X reward points (1.5 per ₹100 spent) on standard spends up to ₹20,000 per statement cycle.
10X reward points (5.0 per ₹100 spent) on Dining, Travel, International, Birthday spends, and incremental spends above ₹20,000.
1X reward points (0.5 per ₹100 spent) on utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway spends.
